creator: littlesavage@rambler.ru
text:
perl-5.10.1_3, p5-Devel-Leak-0.03

 Devel::Leak::CheckSV does not dump objects with never versions of perl even if perl built with-DDEBUGGING option.

Fix: sv_dump() is provided starting with perl 5.6.0: https://rt.cpan.org/Public/Bug/Display.html?id=22587

Patch attached with submission follows:
